raw_text: -0.42, 1.49, 0.74, -0.97, -1.89, 0.16, -0.32, 0.41, 0.19, 0.32, -0.69, 0.62, 0.35, 1.40, -0.34, 0.44, -0.06, -0.52, -0.71, -0.37, 0.19, -1.51, 0.24, -1.49, -0. An embedding vector is a 1D vector that represents a word. The first dimension of the embedding vector is the position of the word in the vocabulary. The second dimension of the embedding vector is the position of the word in the sentence. The third dimension of the embedding vector is the position of the word in the paragraph. Note that the first, second, and third dimensions add up to the position of the word in the document.
